welcome.title: Hey Freeda
welcome.subtitle: Questionnaire
welcome.description: Welcome to Hey Freeda. It's great that you're here. With this questionnaire, we would like to better understand what you need right now and what kind of support might fit your situation.
welcome.resumePrompt: You have an incomplete questionnaire. Would you like to continue?

summary.title: Review Your Answers
summary.notYetSent: Your questionnaire has not been sent yet. You can review your answers here and then submit.

thankYou.title: Thank You!
thankYou.message:
Thank you for taking the time to share your situation with us.

Your answers help us better understand what you need right now and what kind of support could be meaningful and appropriate for you. We treat your information carefully, confidentially, and with respect.

If you indicated that Hey Freeda may contact you, we will reach out through the method you chose. If you prefer no direct contact at the moment, your answers still help us better understand needs and develop suitable programmes for girls and women.
